summary: Completed comprehensive testing of analytics dashboard implementation. All 378 vitest tests pass (29 new analytics tests + 349 existing). Verified analytics types, event store functionality, aggregator functions, admin API protection, and analytics integration across all API routes.
passed_tests: All 378 vitest unit tests pass (29 analytics + 349 existing)
Analytics types exports (DailyStats, LifetimeTotals, AnalyticsSnapshot, FeatureUsage)
Event store recordEvent increments correct counters for chat, tts, memory_read, memory_write, action, error, signup events
Event store recordEvent never throws even with broken KV
Event store recordUserSeen deduplicates same userId on same day
Aggregator formatCostUsd: small amounts to 4 decimals, larger to 2 decimals
Aggregator buildAnalyticsSnapshot returns correct shape with today/yesterday/last7Days/lifetime
Admin API route returns 403 for non-admin users (same error for missing ADMIN_USER_ID and wrong userId)
Admin page has dark glass UI with all 6 sections: KPI cards, Plan Breakdown, 7-Day Trend bar chart, Cost Breakdown table, Lifetime Stats, Recent Activity
Analytics integration in chat/tts/memory/actions routes with fire-and-forget events
